01 — Background

About Me

I am a second-year Diploma student in Computer Engineering at Government Polytechnic, Murtizapur, focused on developing practical skills in cybersecurity, penetration testing, and network security. My goal is to build a strong career in cybersecurity through internships and technical opportunities.

I am especially interested in red teaming, vulnerability assessment and penetration testing (VAPT), Linux-based environments, and web application security. I enjoy learning through hands-on lab environments on platforms like TryHackMe and Hack The Box, where I actively practice real-world attack and defense scenarios.

Beyond formal education, I have participated in job simulations at Deloitte, Tata, and Accenture — gaining exposure to how cybersecurity is practiced in enterprise environments. I believe in building strong fundamentals first, then applying them in practical, high-stakes situations.
